narration_text: If God feels silent right now, stay with me. Silence doesn't always mean He's absent. Sometimes He's working behind the scenes, testing the timing, or redirecting you to something better. Practice patience—celebrate the small mercies each day. If you sense resistance, keep praying—persistent intercession—and put Scripture on like armor. Daniel shows how prayer meets opposition. Keep knocking; Luke 18 reminds us God honors persistence. If the answer isn't yes, ask, "What am I being prepared for?" Reframe the wait as shaping you, not stopping you. Your prayers are heard. Keep walking in faith.
